concise_claim: Lagged synthetic x predicts y in this dataset.

falsification_conditions.description: Blind error does not improve over the frozen tuning persistence baseline.
The independent control metric is associated with the prediction.
The blind rank association is below the preregistered effect threshold.

negative_controls.rationale: The generated control series is independent synthetic noise and should not track the prediction.

rationale: The strong-lag synthetic scenario is generated so y follows x after a fixed 900 second lag plus independent noise.
title: Strong lag synthetic x predicts y
